title: Bulk import RDF - What IRI ?
description:
Hi,
non-standard set of czech national subsidy registry (cedr), not documented well.
URLs used in data are under similar namespaces, such as:
http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/cedr/vocabCEDR#
http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/mmr/vocabMMR#
http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/ruian/vocabRUIAN#
All data are exported in notation-3 (.n3) files, which I'm trying to import.
Will use bulk load, ld_dir('/tmp/', '*.n3', 'http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/cedr/vocabCEDR#');, but thats imho not correct
Is it possible to let the import decide into which graph data belong by auto-discovering correct namespace?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE rdf_import_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph_iri VARCHAR, data TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO rdf_import_test (id, graph_iri, data) VALUES (1, 'http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/cedr/vocabCEDR#', '<http://example.org/resource1> <http://example.org/property> "value1".');
INSERT INTO rdf_import_test (id, graph_iri, data) VALUES (2, 'http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/mmr/vocabMMR#', '<http://example.org/resource2> <http://example.org/property> "value2".');
SELECT * FROM rdf_import_test WHERE graph_iri LIKE 'http://cedropendata.mfcr.cz/c3lod/%' AND data IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE rdf_import_test SET data = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Auto-discover correct namespace during bulk RDF import
